904 WGSS - Women, Gender and Sexuality Studies

WGSS428 Topics in Women, Gender, and Sexuality Studies (1-3 Credits) Thematic exploration of a topic in women, gender, and sexuality studies. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
